description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build_msvc on windows-latest, build_macos on macos-latest, and build_linux on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy for different compilers. Each job should check out the repository with recursive submodules, configure and build the project using cmake and respective build tools, and run tests.
